title: Device Settings  - Custom button - Teams Not Detected
scenario: Custom button configuration shows "Microsoft Teams Not Detected" modal when Teams is not connected on Falcon headsets
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
2. Navigate to Home screen and tap on the connected [Device Name] (Falcon headset).
4. Locate the Custom Button Configuration section.
5. Tap on the custom button assignment field.
6. From the provider list, select "Microsoft Teams".
9. From the available actions list, select one of: Play/Pause, Voice Assistant, Hold/Resume Call, ANC/Transparency Mode, or Do Nothing.
expected: When "Microsoft Teams" is selected but Teams is not connected, a modal displays: "Microsoft Teams is not connected. Select Other Providers to assign other custom actions." The user can switch to "Other Providers" and assign actions like Play/Pause, Voice Assistant, Hold/Resume Call, ANC/Transparency Mode, or Do Nothing. This feature is available only on Falcon headsets.
